mapper.select: SELECT callback_secret FROM t_payment_channel_config WHERE LOWER(channel_code) = LOWER(#{channelCode}) LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_payment_callback_nonce(channel_code, nonce, payment_order_id, expires_at, created_at) VALUES (LOWER(#{channelCode}), #{nonce}, #{paymentOrderId}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{expireSeconds} SECOND), NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_payment_callback_nonce WHERE expires_at <= NOW()
